Announcements

Announcements

The ALAT English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam

01
						September

2025

Dear students,

Our academic placement exam will be conducted online on two different dates as specified in the form below. The exam will be held through the O’learn platform. Please choose your exam date and complete the necessary technical preparations on the O’learn platform before the exam. Information regarding access to the platform will be sent to your email addresses before the exam. You are required to choose and take one of the exams. The result of the first exam you take will be considered valid.

We wish you success.

Click to fill out the Application Form.
